name: Sacerdos' Relived Ordeal
description: Increases SPD by 6%. When using Skill or Ultimate on one ally target, increases the ability target's CRIT DMG by 18%, lasting for 2 turns. This effect can stack up to 2 times.

pieces4.description: When using Skill or Ultimate on one ally target, increases the ability target's CRIT DMG by 18%, lasting for 2 turns. This effect can stack up to 2 times.
